veterinary_certificate_no: Extract the certificate number. Labels: 'Certificate No' / 'Certificate N' / 'Sertifika No' / 'Sertifika Numarasi' / 'Сертификат №' / 'Cert. No'. Usually located in clause 1.5 in the upper part of the form, or in the footer as 'Certificate Number'. Format varies widely: numeric ('6101007342'), composite alphanumeric ('225N42090010947001'), or short numeric ('1142728'). Keep the string exactly as on the form and add it to veterinary_certificate_no.
veterinary_certificate_date: Extract the issue date of the certificate. The date is typically located on the LAST PAGE of the certificate (page 2), in the bottom block near the official stamp and veterinarian signature. Labels: 'Place / Date' / 'Place and Date of Issue' / 'Date / Tarih' / 'Date of Issue' / 'Дата'. Examples: 'TRABZON 26.03.2025', 'RONGCHENG, CHINA 16 APR, 2025', 'TALCAHUANO 04 SEPTEMBER 2019'. DO NOT confuse with date_of_production (clause 2.2) or with expiry_date which appear on page 1. Keep the format as in the source and add to veterinary_certificate_date.
producer: Identify the producer/processing establishment. Default source: clause 3.1 'Name (No) and address of establishment' / 'Adi ve adresi' / 'Название и адрес предприятия' (typically a private company name). FALLBACK: in some certificates clause 3.1 contains a GOVERNMENT VETERINARY AUTHORITY (e.g., a provincial directorate of agriculture, 'PROVINCIAL DIRECTORATE OF AGRICULTURE', 'DIRECTORATE OF FOOD AND CONTROL') NOT a private producer — in that case extract the producer from clause 1.1 (Consignor) instead. Keep the full legal name in one line and add to producer.
buyer: Take the consignee. Labels: 'Name and address of consignee' / 'Alici adi ve adresi' / 'Название и адрес грузополучателя' / 'Consignee'. Located in clause 1.2. Keep the name (and address if shown) in one line and add to buyer.
exporter: Take the consignor/exporter. Labels: 'Name and address of consignor' / 'Gondericinin adi ve adresi' / 'Название и адрес грузоотправителя' / 'Consignor'. Located in clause 1.1. Keep the name (and address if shown) in one line and add to exporter.
vessel: Extract the vessel/ship name only when transport is by sea. Source: clause 1.3 'Means of transport' / 'Nakliye Sekli' / 'Транспорт'. Examples: 'MSC AMBRA/GJ519W', 'LEXA MAERSK V.935N'. If transport is BY TRUCK (e.g., 'BY TRUCK: 61 K 8214 / 61 AAL 959') or BY TRAIN, leave vessel EMPTY — DO NOT confuse with truck plate numbers or train numbers. Add the vessel name (and voyage if shown) only when the transport is a vessel/ship.
container_no: Extract container number from clause 1.3. Format: 4 letters + 7 digits (examples: 'BMOU9288991', 'CRXU6954811', 'PONU4832160'). May also appear separately as 'Container No.'. If multiple, join with '; '. If transport is BY TRUCK (no container is used), leave container_no EMPTY — DO NOT confuse with truck plate numbers. Add to container_no.
veterinary_seal: Extract the veterinary/health seal number from clause 2.6. Labels: 'Number of seal' / 'Muhur Numarasi' / 'Номер пломбы' / 'Seal No'. Examples: 'TRZ00429078', 'FX41279555', 'ML-CL0931771; A0020050'. If multiple, join with '; '. DO NOT confuse with veterinary_certificate_no (clause 1.5, the document identifier) or with linear seal numbers shown elsewhere. Add to veterinary_seal.
country_of_origin: Determine the country of origin. PREFERRED source: clause 1.6 when explicitly labeled 'Country of origin' / 'Mense Ulkesi' / 'Страна происхождения товара' (e.g., 'THE PEOPLE\'S REPUBLIC OF CHINA'). FALLBACK: when clause 1.6 is labeled 'Exporting country' / 'Ihracatci ulke' / 'Страна-экспортер' (Turkey, Chile templates), use that exporting country (e.g., 'TURKIYE', 'CHILE'). Record the country only. Add to country_of_origin.
products: The 'products' block is expandable: create product_1, product_2, ... for each line/batch in sections 2.1-2.8. Keep order. If an attribute is given once for the whole batch (e.g., one seal or one Latin species), duplicate it in the relevant product_i. In token_refs include references to the source fragments used.
products[*].name_product: Extract the commercial product name from clause 2.1. Labels: 'Name of the product' / 'Urun adi' / 'Наименование продукта'. Examples: 'FROZEN ATLANTIC SALMON FILLETS', 'FROZEN RAINBOW TROUT WR IQF', 'FROZEN OILFISH HGT'. Exclude the Latin species in parentheses (extract that to latin_name). Add to products[i].name_product.
products[*].latin_name: Extract the Latin species name from clause 2.1, typically in parentheses after the commercial name (e.g., 'ONCORHYNCHUS MYKISS', 'LEPIDOCYBIUM FLAVOBRUNNEUM', 'SALMO SALAR', 'UNDARIA PINNATIFIDA'). Note: not every parenthesized text is Latin — for example '(CHUKA SALAD)' is a transliterated local name, not Latin. Pick only the scientific species name. If absent, leave empty. Add to products[i].latin_name.
products[*].packages: Extract the package count from clause 2.4. Labels: 'Number of packages' / 'Paket Sayisi' / 'Количество мест'. Examples: '738 BOXES', '1153 BAGS', '2500 cartons'. If multiple values (by batches), join with '; ' in one line. Add to products[i].packages.
products[*].net_weight: Extract net weight from clause 2.5. Labels: 'Net weight (kg)' / 'Net agirlik' / 'Вес нетто (кг)'. Keep number in the original format (dot/comma) and unit. If multiple values, join with '; '. Add to products[i].net_weight.
products[*].factory_number: Extract the establishment registration number from clause 2.7. Labels: 'Identification marks' / 'Tanimlama Isareti' / 'Маркировка'. Format varies widely: numeric ('10751', '10735'), country prefix + number ('TR 61-0024'), or composite ('3700/02C90'). If multiple, join with '; '. Add to products[i].factory_number.
products[*].date_of_production: Extract production date(s) from clause 2.2. Labels: 'Date of production' / 'Uretim tarihi' / 'Дата выработки продукции'. May be a single date (e.g., '27.06.2024', '20.02.2025') or a list of multiple dates with batch quantities (e.g., '05-06-2019(1), 23-07-2019(4), 25-07-2019(107)...'). If multiple dates, join with '; ' in one line. DO NOT confuse with veterinary_certificate_date (issue date on page 2) or expiry_date. Add to products[i].date_of_production.
products[*].seal_number: Extract the seal number(s) for the item from clause 2.6. Labels: 'Number of seal' / 'Muhur Numarasi' / 'Номер пломбы'. If one number applies to the whole batch, also duplicate it to document-level veterinary_seal. If multiple values, join with '; '. Add to products[i].seal_number.
products[*].unit_box: Extract the package type from clause 2.3. Labels: 'Type of package' / 'Paket cesidi' / 'Упаковка'. Examples: 'CARTONS', 'BAGS', 'CARDBOARD BOXES'. Keep the wording as on the form and add to products[i].unit_box.
